Canton Fair Competitor Analysis

Focused benchmark of 10 relevant competitor sites (5 list-selling + 5 high-visibility directory/event-data peers).

Reviewed Sites

  • ExhibitorsData
  • VisitorsList
  • BizProspex
  • BuyersContacts
  • ExpoCaptive
  • 10Times
  • EventsEye
  • Events in America
  • B2BTradeShows
  • Exhibitrac

Side-by-side Comparison

SiteStrengthMain PatternWhat to Borrow
ExhibitorsDataSection-rich landingCTA repeated throughoutFunnelized section sequence
VisitorsListSEO-heavy contentContent-first conversionKeyword + intent alignment
BizProspexPrice-forward product pageStrong buy intent framingCommercial clarity and urgency
BuyersContactsB2B utility framingList-category navigationUse-case-oriented copy blocks
ExpoCaptiveEducation + sales bridgeProblem-to-solution flowPre-sell explanation before CTA
10TimesMassive event directory footprintDirectory-scale discoverabilityHigh-coverage event indexing model
EventsEyeLegacy global trade show directoryCategory + region browsingStructured taxonomy and long-tail SEO
Events in AmericaUS-focused trade show ecosystemDirectory + supplier discoveryB2B utility navigation patterns
B2BTradeShowsGlobal fair/expo listing styleCalendar + category filter pagesSimple listing architecture for coverage
ExhibitracEvent/exhibitor intelligence styleData-oriented event workflowResearch-first product framing

Recommended Page Blueprint

  1. Hero + strong value proposition
  2. Quick stats (records/fields/years/update date)
  3. Sample table preview
  4. Packages by year with clear pricing
  5. FAQ and objections handling
  6. Final CTA and support contact
